item.name: Smooth Jaguar
item.description:
While there are many wavekin named after lions and tigers, the majestic jaguar is criminally underrepresented.

[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: From the patterning on its scales, to the agile twists and turns it makes as it chases down its prey, this underwater hunter is eerily similar to its land-based namesake. Just squint a bit, and you'll see it.
